Thanks Vishal. Noted on the clarifications.

I’ll update the draft design accordingly with the following:

use 7 AM NZT as the current working cut-off time for Req 43, subject to final confirmation
treat “corrupt” at Function App scope as unexpected file type/extension or decrypted file format only
remove SharePoint handling from Scenario 4
update Scenario 4 to D365/Dataverse row save failure with retry, then notify after retry exhaustion
treat Req 47 as duplicate of Req 45
include App Insights logging for file read/transfer activity instead of introducing separate arrival-tracking storage

I’ll revise the design note and sequence diagram based on this.
